name: BLOCK-T378
configuration_schema:
$schema: http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#
description: Configuration for BLOCK-T378.
properties:
  azimuth:
    default: 0.0
    description: Azimuth.
    type: number
  elevation:
    default: 60.0
    description: Elevation.
    type: number
  exp_time:
    default: 15.0
    description: Exposure time.
    type: number
  filter:
    default: i_39
    description: Filter to use.
    type: string
  num_steps:
    default: 9
    description: Number of steps for the sensitivity matrix.
    type: integer
  rotation_sequence:
    anyOf:
    - type: number
    - items:
        type: number
      minItems: 2
      type: array
    default: 0.0
title: BLOCK-T378 configuration
type: object
